text.title: Frontend Component Practices Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the practices-frontend-components methodology end-to-end.

step.name: spec-and-name
step.action: Derive component name (PascalCase) + props interface + controlled/uncontrolled choice + a11y role.

step.name: scaffold-file
step.action: Emit Component.tsx with typed props, semantic role, keyboard handlers, scoped styles import.

step.name: sibling-test
step.action: Emit Component.test.tsx covering: render with default props, accessible name present, controlled-mode change handler fires.

step.name: sibling-story
step.action: Emit Component.stories.tsx with at least 3 prop variants (default, loading, error).
